18.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
18.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

18.gl: a step or (collectively, stairs, as ascending); usually a holocaust (as going up in smoke)

18.dv: or עוֹלָה; feminine active participle of H5927 (עָלָה);
